error[E0502]: cannot borrow `buf` as immutable because it is also borrowed as mutable
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4-turbo/declarations/restrict_def_2/sample_005/target.rs:25:30
   |
25 |         f(n, &mut buf[..n], &buf[off..off + n]);
   |         -         ---        ^^^ immutable borrow occurs here
   |         |         |
   |         |         mutable borrow occurs here
   |         mutable borrow later used by call
   |
   = help: use `.split_at_mut(position)` to obtain two mutable non-overlapping sub-slices
